zh.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley於1410年出生在英國波克夏。她和William De Chabonnare至少有1個女兒。她去世於1510年在她的家鄉享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley于1410年出生在英国波克夏。她和William De Chabonnare至少有1个女儿。她去世于1510年在她的家乡享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Harley (Shropshire, Yorkshire). The Shropshire placename derives from Old English hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ or hær + hlāw ‘mound, hill’, later replaced by lēah.

Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghaile ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal without the initial F-. This name has also become Herley and Hurley . Compare Arrell and Harrell .
Scottish (Fife): habitational name from any of several places called Harlaw in Midlothian, Peeblesshire, and Berwickshire, named in Older Scots with hare ‘gray’ + law ‘hill’.

variants.name: Herley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Art, Cormac.
Irish: variant of   Hurley  , probably via   Herlihy  .
English: variant of   Harley   or   Hurley  .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley was born in 1410, in Berkshire, England. She had at least 1 daughter with William De Chabonnare. She died in 1510, in her hometown, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley est née en 1410, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec William De Chabonnare. Elle est décédée en 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley wurde 1410 in Berkshire, England geboren. Sie hatte mit William De Chabonnare mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 100 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley è nata il nel 1410 nel Berkshire, England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con William De Chabonnare. Morì nel 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Harleyは1410年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はWilliam De Chabonnareとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1510年に故郷で100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley(은)는 1410년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William De Chabonnare(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 그녀의 고향에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley nasceu em 1410, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com William De Chabonnare. Ela faleceu em 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley родилась в 1410 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от William De Chabonnare. Она умерла в 1510 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sybil Harley nació en 1410, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con William De Chabonnare. Murió en 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 100 años.
